description_long: This object is a dark-colored shotgun with a robust, angular design reminiscent of military-style firearms. It features a long, cylindrical barrel with a front sight post and a prominent gas tube above the barrel, suggesting a semi-automatic or gas-operated mechanism. The stock is solid and straight, providing stability for shoulder firing, while the pistol grip and trigger assembly are integrated into the main body. The magazine is curved and detachable, positioned just ahead of the trigger guard, and the receiver has minimal external ornamentation, emphasizing functionality. The overall finish is matte, with subtle texturing on the grip and stock for improved handling.
description: A matte black, military-style shotgun with a long barrel, solid stock, and curved magazine, featuring a robust and functional design.
description_view_0: The shotgun is viewed directly from the front, showing the narrow profile of the barrel and the front sight post.
description_view_1: A full side view reveals the long barrel, solid stock, curved magazine, and the overall angular, utilitarian design.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the narrow end of the stock and the alignment of the barrel, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the same key features including the magazine, stock, and barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long cylindrical barrel with a front sight post and no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
